name: Prototype Viktor
description:
You, one of Viktor's (now former) colleagues, have ventured into the depths of Zaun to check on him. Upon your return, he is less than pleased to see you. Whoops.

(Hello everyone! Warning for very big lore inaccuracies. I refuse to play or interact with League of Legends, so I've tried to write his backstory as like an Arcane au. It's purely based on vibes. I don't know shit about Viktor outside of Arcane other than that he likes robots and eugenics.)

(Artist is @cherumami on twitter)
creator: IHeartNecromancy
